Simpler: we can use sed to add nosuid if missing.

We'll do:

- read_file: path=/etc/fstab
- run_cmd: command="awk -v opts='$4' '{ if ($2 == \"/boot\") { $4 = $4 \",nosuid\"; gsub(/^,+$/, \",\"); sub(/,$/, \",\"); } { print $0}'" /etc/fstab > /etc/fstab.tmp
But we need to avoid complex quoting.

Maybe easier: use sed to add nosuid if not present.

We can do: sed -i '/\/boot[[:space:]]/s/[[:space:]]*$/,s/,nosuid/ /etc/fstab
